name: gravel-monorepo
description: Gravel — embedded prompt management, tracing, and evals for AI engineering teams.

scripts.schema-drift: pnpm --filter @artanis/gravel schema:dump > /tmp/gravel-ts-schema.sql && cd python/gravel && uv run python -m artanis_gravel.schema_dump > /tmp/gravel-py-schema.sql && diff /tmp/gravel-ts-schema.sql /tmp/gravel-py-schema.sql
